summary: April 2020 Cavallo community roundup sharing news from the equine world during COVID lockdown, including Emma Massingale's mini Shetlands, Monty Roberts events, Trailmeister, and Pure Liberty training.
April 2020 Team Cavallo update featuring sponsored riders and miniature therapy horses, including Kiwi's film, Hughie's CLB Bling boots, and Cathy Jo and Blue at Boise State games.
Announcement that Cavallo has become an Affiliate Partner of the United States Pony Club (USPC), offering member discounts on hoof boots and saddle pads with sales benefiting USPC.
Invitation to join the International Liberty Horse Association founded by Dan and Elizabeth James, with a Cavallo membership discount and background on the Double Dans horsemanship duo.
Coverage of a Western Kentucky University study comparing Cavallo Trek hoof boots to metal shoes, finding the boots offer better hoof protection, traction, and reduced pressure via FujiFilm imaging.
Customer testimonials on using Cavallo Trek boots as overboots over metal horseshoes during turnout to stop horses from throwing shoes, featuring Diane V. from Ontario and others.
Explainer on using Cavallo hoof boots as overboots for shod horses, covering shoe retention, all-terrain shock absorption, and protection during jumping and hoof rehab.
Three tips for successfully transitioning a horse out of metal shoes to barefoot-and-booted, framed as advice from Carole Herder responding to a reader's letter about going barefoot.
Overview of Cavallo Comfort Pads, a removable polymer insole for hoof boots that absorbs shock, tightens fit, and aids hoof therapy/rehabilitation; fits all Cavallo boots size 0-6.
May 2020 Team Cavallo happenings featuring sponsored riders and their boots, including Thea of Crazy Shetlands in Norway, Emma Massingale's mini ponies, and a farewell to Sarah and Merry.
May 2020 Cavallo community roundup linking out to We Ride Sport & Trail Magazine, Trailmeister, Monty Roberts' award-nominated podcast, and Best of America by Horseback.
May 2020 collection of customer testimonials about Cavallo hoof boots, including a foundered BLM Mustang fitted with Trek boots and Comfort Pads, and using boots over metal shoes.
